ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing data quality measurement programs, including profiling, metrics definition, scoring methodologies, and quantification of business impact.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-001 (Data Quality/Skill) scores 0.424 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.424). Scope is in_scope for Clinical AI Specialist: 1 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, Data Quality, composite 0.424. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Quality for Clinical AI Specialist?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in approximately 65% of Clinical AI Specialist job postings. Clinical data quality and validation dataset management appear in majority of postings.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality is market-validated for Clinical AI Specialist. Final decision: include.
